---
name: Feature request
about: 为本项目提出功能改进的建议 / Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**你的修改建议是解决某个目前你遇到的痛点吗？ / Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
请清楚简洁地说明这个痛点是什么。例如：“当我要导入大批量的特殊格式图片时我觉得很不方便，因为....” / A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**你希望的新功能效果是怎样的？ / Describe the solution you'd like**
请详细描述该功能期望的样子。 / A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**有没有可以参考的竞品及其替代方案？ / Describe alternatives you've considered**
如果有其他软件曾有过类似且非常棒的设计，请在这里附上截图或名称。 / A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**其他补充 / Additional context**
任何能帮助我们进行特性讨论的重要信息或者设计图、草稿均可以附在这里上传。 / Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
